# =============== Unity ================
[Ll]ibrary/
[Tt]emp/
[Oo]bj/
[Bb]uild/
[Bb]uilds/
UserSettings/
MemoryCaptures/
sysinfo.txt
*.log

# Autogenerated VS/IDE files
*.csproj
*.unityproj
*.sln
*.suo
*.tmp
*.user
*.userprefs
*.pidb
*.booproj
*.svd
*.pdb
*.opendb
*.VC.db

# OS files
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db

# Rider
.idea/
*.sln.iml

# Visual Studio Code
.vscode/

# Unity Addressables
/[Aa]ssets/AddressableAssetsData/*/*.bin

# Asset Store / cache
/[Aa]ssets/AssetStoreTools*
/Library/PackageCache/
/Library/ArtifactDB

# Build results
/[Bb]uild/
/[Bb]uilds/
/*.apk
/*.aab
/*.unitypackage

# Crash reports
crash.log

# Packed player
*.app
*.exe

# LFS: keep .gitattributes under version control when using Git LFS
.gitattributes

# Ignore files generated at runtime
[Aa]ssets/**/*.meta
# Keep meta files tracked, but ignore auto-generated caches:
# (If you want to track .meta files, do NOT ignore them globally — Unity requires .meta files tracked.
# The following prevents ignoring .meta files in Assets and ProjectSettings)
!/[Aa]ssets/**/.meta
!/[Pp]roject[Ss]ettings/**/.meta

# Exclude packaged plugin builds and runtime caches
/[Ll]ibrary/**/ScriptAssemblies/
/[Ll]ibrary/**/PackageCache/
/[Ll]ibrary/**/Burst-***
/[Ll]ibrary/**/ShaderCache/
/[Ll]ibrary/**/com.unity.burst*/
[Ll]ibrary/PlayerDataCache/
[Ll]ibrary/ArtifactDB
[Ll]ibrary/PackageCache/

# Temp folders
Temp/
Temp/**

# User settings (IDE/editor)
/[Uu]ser[Ss]ettings/

# MonoDevelop
*.pidb
*.userprefs

# JetBrains Rider caches
.idea/
.idea/**/workspace.xml
.idea/**/tasks.xml
.idea/**/usage.statistics.xml
.idea/**/shelf/

# Generated by Unity (keep ProjectSettings tracked)
/ProjectSettings/EditorBuildSettings.asset
/ProjectSettings/ProjectSettings.asset
/ProjectSettings/GraphicsSettings.asset
/ProjectSettings/TagManager.asset
/ProjectSettings/TimeManager.asset
/ProjectSettings/QualitySettings.asset
/ProjectSettings/InputManager.asset
/ProjectSettings/EditorSettings.asset

# Avoid committing large compiled binaries from packages
**/Assets/**/*.dll

# Ignore large native libs and caches (but if you need specific large files, track them with Git LFS instead)
**/Library/**/.Runtime/*
**/Library/**/libburst-*
**/Library/**/burst-*.*
**/Library/**/*.so
**/Library/**/*.dll
**/Library/**/*.dylib

# Optional: ignore specific editor telemetry or logs
.analytics/
*.pid

# Node / npm (if present)
node_modules/

# Unity Cache Server
/Library/com.unity.collab-proxy/
